source: SochDB release-quality checklist — storage engine / SDK release gate

gates.title: Crash recovery tests pass
gates.description: WAL crash scenarios: uncommitted rollback, commit atomicity, torn writes

gates.title: Uncommitted transaction rollback after crash
gates.description: Begin txn → write → crash before commit → data not visible

gates.title: Committed transaction survives crash
gates.description: Commit → crash immediately → committed data exists

gates.title: Torn-write detection
gates.description: Truncate/corrupt WAL bytes → recovery stops safely

gates.title: Checksum corruption rejected
gates.description: Corrupt checksum → bad record rejected on replay

gates.title: Checkpoint + WAL truncation recovery
gates.description: Checkpoint → truncate WAL → reopen → data correct

gates.title: Future WAL segment version rejected
gates.description: Never silently open unknown future format

gates.title: Upgrade contract rejects incompatible future version
gates.description: Old DB open + future version fail-fast

gates.title: Durability contract tests
gates.description: ACID durability modes: fsync, group commit, torn-write detection

gates.title: Loom MVCC concurrency model
gates.description: Lock-free reader-slot CAS + HLC timestamp advance
gates.command: RUSTFLAGS="--cfg loom" cargo test -p sochdb-storage --test loom_concurrency

gates.title: Storage library tests (release)
gates.description: MVCC, epoch, concurrent access under release build

gates.title: Concurrent vector insert/search tests
gates.description: HNSW + index layer concurrency

gates.title: Long stress tests (--ignored)
gates.description: Multi-reader/multi-writer, long transactions, compaction under read

gates.title: FFI panic firewall module present
gates.description: catch_unwind boundary for extern C functions

gates.title: Storage FFI uses panic firewall
gates.description: sochdb-storage/src/ffi.rs wraps extern C with ffi_guard!

gates.title: Index FFI uses panic firewall
gates.description: sochdb-index/src/ffi.rs wraps extern C with ffi_guard!

gates.title: Workspace version defined
gates.description: Cargo.toml [workspace.package] version is set

gates.title: AGPL license file present
gates.description: LICENSE must ship with all artifacts

gates.title: cargo-deny configuration present
gates.description: deny.toml for license/advisory/ban checks

gates.title: Python SDK package defined
gates.description: sochdb-python/pyproject.toml exists

gates.title: Node.js SDK package defined
gates.description: sochdb-sdk/node/package.json exists

gates.title: Rust formatting check
gates.description: cargo fmt --all -- --check

gates.title: Clippy with -D warnings (release gate)
gates.description: Stricter than PR CI — no warnings allowed

gates.title: Workspace release tests
gates.description: cargo test --release --workspace --lib

gates.title: Standalone perf targets (10K scale)
gates.description: No >10% regression vs sochdb-bench baseline

gates.title: Distributed gRPC perf targets
gates.description: HNSW search, vector insert within benchmark tolerance

gates.title: Vector recall@5 stable (SciFact)
gates.description: Recall@5 must not drop below 0.76 (5% below 0.8037 baseline)

gates.title: Mixed 80r/20w SLO target
gates.description: 831K ops/s at 10K scale

gates.title: cargo audit — no known vulnerabilities
gates.description: Dependency vulnerability scan

gates.title: cargo deny — license + advisory + ban
gates.description: deny.toml policy enforcement

gates.title: No hardcoded secrets in source
gates.description: Scan for API tokens / passwords in tracked files

gates.title: WAL ACID guarantees documented in code
gates.description: TxnWal documents atomicity, durability, torn-write, rollback

gates.title: Python SDK import structure
gates.description: sochdb-python package __init__.py exists

gates.title: Release notes cover compatibility
gates.description: Manual: WAL/index/API/migration/rollback sections in release notes

gates.title: Version sync across SDKs
gates.description: Rust/Python/npm/Go versions must match at release

gates.title: Release artifacts have checksums
gates.description: SHA256 checksums published with wheels/npm/crates

gates.title: Publish dry-run completed
gates.description: TestPyPI / npm pack / crates.io dry-run before real publish

gates.title: Fusion pipeline design validated
gates.description: Candidate masks flow without serialization between ART/HNSW/CSR

gates.title: Core workspace crates present
gates.description: core/storage/index/query/fusion/client/vector/tools/grpc
